name: ReeXploration Inc.
description: ReeXploration Inc. (TSXV: REE) is a discovery-driven critical minerals company focused on the exploration and development of rare earth elements and uranium. The company’s flagship asset is the Eureka Project, located in Namibia, a jurisdiction recognized for its stability and mining-friendly environment. Formerly known as E-Tech Resources Inc., the company rebranded to ReeXploration Inc. in 2025. It is dedicated to advancing its projects to secure sustainable supplies of critical minerals essential for global clean energy transitions and supply chain security, operating with a commitment to responsible development and technical excellence.
